description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a vibrant blue exterior, featuring a large, edge-to-edge display on the front. The screen shows a night sky wallpaper with a visible shooting star and a gradient from deep blue to black, suggesting a high-resolution display. The back of the phone is a solid matte blue with a subtle embossed Apple logo in the center and a dual camera module positioned vertically in the top left corner. The sides are smoothly rounded, and the phone appears to be encased in a blue protective shell that matches the back. No physical buttons are visible on the front or back, and the overall design is sleek and minimalist. The phone is compact and thin, typical of contemporary smartphones, and would fit comfortably in a user's hand.
description: A sleek blue smartphone with a large display showing a night sky wallpaper, matte blue back with an embossed Apple logo, and a dual camera module in the top left corner.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display with a night sky wallpaper and a blue frame.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the slim profile and blue casing, with no visible buttons.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the matte blue surface, embossed Apple logo, and dual camera module in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim blue edge, with no visible buttons or ports.
attribute_brand_logo: Embossed Apple logo centered on the back, subtle and matching the blue color of the case.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a wallpaper of a starry night sky with a shooting star and a gradient from blue to black, with no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: Dual camera module vertically aligned in the top left corner on the back, with a small flash below the lenses.
attribute_button_layout: No physical buttons are visible on any side of the phone.
attribute_case_or_cover_design: The phone is encased in a snug-fitting, matte blue protective cover that wraps around the back and sides, with a smooth texture and no visible patterns.
